CommonMethod*.description: Useful methods for manipulating files and their contents. Also contains other useful methods.

deleteFile.description: Path of the file to delete.

appendToFile.description: Appends the given text to the file in the filePath

filePath.description: Path to file that is to be appended to.

text.description: The text to append into file

saveFileModifiedDate.description: Saves the modified date of the file in the filePath to an Internal variable called 'lastModifiedDate'

filePath.description: Path to file whose last modified date is to be saved.

compareFileModifiedDateToSavedDate.description: Takes the current modified date of the file in the filePath THEN compares it to an Internal variable called 'lastModifiedDate'. !!! use 'saveFileModifiedDate' before using this command.

filePath.description: Path to file whose last modified date should be used to compare with the Internal variable 'lastModifiedDate'.

expect.description: Specific how the 'lastModifiedDate' should be compared with the modified date of file specified.

replaceTextInFile.description: Replaces the 'textToReplace' in the given file with the 'newText'. !!! Make sure to undo this change by using 'replaceTextInFile' but flipping the 'textToReplace' and 'newText'.

filePath.description: Filepath to file whose text should be replaced.

textToReplace.description: We will search the file for this text.

newText.description: The text to replace the 'textToReplace' with if it was found.

copyFile.description: Creates a copy of the file 'from' path 'to' path. Can also set 'from' or 'to' to 'tempFile' to save the file to an internal variable called tempFile.

from.description: The filePath and file to create a copy FROM. Set this to 'tempFile' to use the file stored in the Internal variable tempFile as the file to copy from.

to.description: The filePath and file to create of copy TO. Set this to 'tempFile' to copy the 'from' file into Internal variable tempFile.

renameFiles.description: Renames the file in 'currentPath' to 'newPath'. !!! Do not forget to undo renamming you renamed a non Tmp file.

currentPath.description: The filepath and file to rename.

newPath.description: The filepath and the new name of the file.

findFile.description: Attempt to find file in the src path or with a raw path

path.description: Path from resources folder to check if file exists for

rawPath.description: Takes a raw path and file name and checks that the file exists in the given location.

path.description: Raw path to file location, do not include file here.

file.description: The file name and extension to check if exists.
